zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Wenman於1460年12月12日出生在英國英格蘭奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾時，她的父親Sir Richard Weynman30歲，母親Izabel Emote30歲。她於1480年與Laurence Richards在英國奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1560年8月在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾伊斯頓 內斯頓享年99歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾伊斯頓 內斯頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Wenman于1460年12月12日出生在英国英格兰奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾时，她的父亲Sir Richard Weynman30岁，母亲Izabel Emote30岁。她于1480年与Laurence Richards在英国奧可福爾明斯特 洛弗爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1560年8月在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾伊斯頓 內斯頓享年99岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾伊斯頓 內斯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Wenman
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Scandinavian Johan, Nels.
English (Kent, Middlesex, and Berskhire): variant of   Wainman  .
Swedish: ornamental or habitational name formed with an unexplained first element (probably from placenames beginning with Venn- or Vänn-, of many possible origins) + man ‘man’.

variants.name: Wainman
meanings: English (Lancashire and Yorkshire): occupational name from Middle English wain-man ‘wagon-driver’.

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Wenman was born on 12 December 1460, in Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Richard Weynman, was 30 and her mother, Izabel Emote, was 30. She married Laurence Richards in 1480, in Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died in August 1560, in Easton Neston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 99, and was buried in Easton Neston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Wenman est née le 12 décembre 1460, à Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Richard Weynman, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Izabel Emote, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Laurence Richards en 1480, à Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en août 1560, à Easton Neston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 99 ans, et a été enterrée à Easton Neston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1480 in Minster Lovell, Oxfordshire, England Laurence Richards geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wenmanが1460年12月12日にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアミンスター ロベルで生まれた時，父Sir Richard Weynmanは30歳，母Izabel Emoteは30歳であった。1480年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアミンスター ロベルでLaurence Richardsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1560年8月にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアエアストン ネストンで99歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアエアストン ネストンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Wenman(이)가 1460년 12월 12일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 민스터 러벨에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Richard Weynman(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Izabel Emote(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1480년 영국 스퍼드실르 민스터 러벨에서 Laurence Richards(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1560년 8월 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 이스트 네스턴에서 99세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 이스트 네스턴에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Wenman родилась 12 декабря 1460 г. в местности минстир лавелл, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Richard Weynman было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Izabel Emote, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Laurence Richards в 1480 г. в местности минстир лавелл, оксфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла август 1560 г. в местности эастон нестон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 99 лет и была похоронена в местности эастон нестон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания.
